title: tragacantha collina
intro: Tragacantha collina, also known as the common broom, is a perennial plant species belonging to the pea family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tragacantha collina include its ability to treat digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antispasmodic. Herbal preparations of Tragacantha collina include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
